description.description: Defines the purpose or details of the permission set to help identify its role or usage within AWS SSO.

instance_arn.description: Specifies the ARN of the AWS SSO instance associated with the permission set.

name.description: Defines the name of the permission set, which must be unique within the AWS SSO instance.

relay_state.description: Default URL or state that users are directed to after signing in, must be a valid URL format.

session_duration.description: Defines the duration for a single sign-on session, specified in ISO 8601 format (e.g., PT1H for 1 hour). Must be between 1 hour and 12 hours.

tags.description: Key-value pairs to categorize or organize resources, typically used for management, cost tracking, or identification purposes.

timeouts.description: Defines custom timeout settings for operations such as create, update, and delete actions.
